purpose: Frozen test set for Part 15 v2 Refinement #2 — Enforcer regex deprecation empirical gate. Fixture replay must hit ≥90% recall and ≥98% precision before the LiteLLM interceptor replaces enforcer_deterministic.py regex paths.
sourcing: Mix of real session captures (2026-05-12 to 2026-05-17 Slack #execution + slack_relay R_CEO_FORMAT_BLOCKED returns) and canonical rule-anchor examples drawn from src/bot_common/enforcer_rules.py + src/bot_common/enforcer_deterministic.py. Frozen on first ratification of Part 15 v2; new entries require KEI + 3-way CONCUR.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: Real-time coordination bus is live on the Vultr Sydney host. Agents will now signal each other (task available, task complete, escalations) through sub-millisecond in-process events instead of waiting on Slack relay. This unblocks the Dispatcher build (Elliot's next piece) and ends the idle-token burn from Slack polling. Verified: 0.18ms publish→receive vs the 5ms target. PR #908 merged with dual approval (Elliot + Aiden), CI all green. Linear KEI-75 / bd KEI-101 closed.
incidents.source: Captured 2026-05-17 from slack_relay R_CEO_FORMAT_BLOCKED return: 'no bold category header at line start; prose paragraph; banned technical tokens: PR #908'.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: All four T0 sub-tasks landed in main. SHA ae4d2fc6 for the coordination bus + sha 51a74f6b for the relay watcher fix. CI green across the board including the new SonarCloud gate that Aiden tightened last week.
incidents.source: Canonical: banned technical tokens (commit SHAs, PR-style references, 'SonarCloud gate') in #ceo body without bold headers + bullets.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: Migration KEI-84 applied successfully. We dropped the orphan tables ceo_memory_archive + elliot_knowledge + elliot_signoff_queue. The DB now matches the canonical schema from supabase/migrations/20260512_drop_orphan_tables.sql.
incidents.source: Canonical: banned tokens (file paths under supabase/migrations/, env-var-style schema names) without plain-English business framing.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: [DISPATCH:atlas] kei100_t02_litellm_dispatch.json written to atlas inbox. Pick up + DECOMPOSE.
incidents.source: Canonical: clone dispatch without prior [DISPATCH-PROPOSAL:elliot] + 20-second peer concur window — Rule 8 fire condition per enforcer_deterministic.py L324-345.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: [DISPATCH:orion] kei73_litellm_v2.json written. Step 0 PRE-CONFIRMED. Build incoming.
incidents.source: Canonical: clone dispatch without [DISPATCH-PROPOSAL:aiden] in preceding 20s window — same rule shape as r8-002.
Negative case per RULES_PROMPT: bare 'Holding' is NOT a Rule 9 violation — it's a legitimate gated-status update when agent is blocked. Corpus must NOT flag this; precision check.

incidents.message_body_verbatim: [PROPOSE:aiden] Implement per-tenant Cognee User minting in src/cognee/client.py. ~50-80 LoC. Tests covering first-call mints + second-call reuses + cross-tenant isolation. Coding now in parallel with Atlas's install track.
incidents.source: Negative case: ends with concrete [PROPOSE:aiden] action, not directive-seeking. Must NOT flag; precision check on legitimate propose-format.
